what: Independent re-derivation of stark #642/#727 local->official-equiv projection (advisor deliverable 2). Cross-read under #666.

the_0p870_claim.advisor_framing: official-equiv 134.87 projected via a 'stark tax 0.870' ratio
the_0p870_claim.what_0p870_actually_is: acceptor_over_unrescued_ratio (a/c) = rescued_local 135.27 / unrescued_K6_ceiling ~155.5 = 0.870 (captured). A description of the rescue tax as the fraction of the un-rescued ceiling retained, NOT the local->official map.
the_0p870_claim.also_0p870_elsewhere: conditional_p_sglang proxy in descent_vs_bothbugs_private/results.json:59 = 0.8702 (an acceptance-probability proxy) -- coincidental same value, also not a TPS tax

K6_deproject_eager_floor.basis: eager floor -- injected recompute does NOT replay captured cudagraph

K5_correcting_rescue.basis: NON-INSTANTIABLE projection -- stark #727 WRITEBACK_INFEASIBLE_LOCAL (no write-back surface on vLLM 0.22.0)

K5_real_dummy_tau_gate.basis: the only LOCALLY-INSTANTIABLE rescue arm; non-correcting, over-fires 11.25%/emit

K5_unrescued_ceiling.basis: REAL measured local, but NOT strict-128/128 clean (#654 int4 batch-shape ties at prefill+decode)

fast_drafter_plateau_147p55.basis: recurring local served clock plateau (fast unquantized-assistant drafter), the advisor's '147.55 fast drafter'

ci_on_134p87.verdict: NOT a tight sampling CI -- the load-bearing uncertainty is a bimodal captured-vs-eager bracket
ci_on_134p87.bracket_meaning: 119.9 if the width-1 recompute forward falls to eager (no cudagraph replay) -> BELOW rung; 134.87 if it cleanly replays the captured graph -> clears rung. Point estimate sits at the optimistic captured end.
ci_on_134p87.superseding_finding: stark #727: the correcting rescue that 134.87/139.852 model is non-instantiable on vLLM 0.22.0 (only the _dummy_run profiling stub + post-commit hook exist). So 134.87 is a COMPOSITION (un-rescued ceiling x modeled retained fraction), not a measured rescued serve. Only the gated official benchmark resolves the assumed-equal-tax map.

deliverable2_answer: The 0.870 'tax' is misattributed: it is acceptor_over_unrescued_ratio (retained fraction of the un-rescued ceiling), not the local->official projection multiplier. The real map is x0.99705 (AR-rung anchor, assumed-equal-tax), sound only modulo the gated official benchmark. 134.87 has no tight CI -- it is the optimistic (captured-graph) end of a [119.9, 134.87] bracket that straddles the rung, and stark #727 shows the underlying correcting rescue is non-instantiable, so 134.87 is a projection/composition not a measured serve.
